1:
SELECT DISTINCT e."name" AS hall_name,
       e."capacity"
FROM "eventspaces" e
WHERE (LOWER(e."type") LIKE '%banquet%'
       OR LOWER(e."type") LIKE '%conference%')
  AND CAST(e."capacity" AS INTEGER) >= 200
ORDER BY e."name";
2:
SELECT
    "id" AS space_id,
    "name" AS space_name,
    "capacity" AS space_capacity,
    "type" AS space_type
FROM
    "eventspaces"
WHERE
    
    CAST("capacity" AS INTEGER) = 200
    AND (
        
        LOWER("type") LIKE '%банкет%'
        OR LOWER("type") LIKE '%банкетный%'
        OR LOWER("type") LIKE '%банкетн%'
        
        OR LOWER("type") LIKE '%конференц%'
        OR LOWER("type") LIKE '%конференц-зал%'
        OR LOWER("type") LIKE '%конференц зал%'
    )
ORDER BY
    "name";
3:
SELECT DISTINCT
    r."name" AS restaurant_name,
    CASE
        WHEN LOWER(r."name") LIKE '%restaurant%' THEN 'Restaurant'
        WHEN LOWER(r."name") LIKE '%cafe%' THEN 'Cafe'
        WHEN LOWER(r."name") LIKE '%caffè%' THEN 'Cafe'
        WHEN LOWER(r."name") LIKE '%caffè%' THEN 'Cafe'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS establishment_type
FROM
    "restaurants" r
WHERE
    LOWER(r."cuisine") LIKE '%italian%'
ORDER BY
    establishment_type,
    restaurant_name;
4:
SELECT DISTINCT
    r."id",
    r."name" AS restaurant_name,
    r."cuisine" AS cuisine_type
FROM
    "restaurants" r
WHERE
    
    r."type" = 'restaurant'
    OR
    
    (r."type" = 'cafe' AND LOWER(r."cuisine") LIKE '%итальян%')
ORDER BY
    r."type",
    r."name";
5:
SELECT DISTINCT r."id", r."name"
FROM "restaurants" r
WHERE LOWER(r."cuisine") LIKE '%итальян%'
   OR LOWER(r."cuisine") LIKE '%italian%';
6:
SELECT
    s."id" AS staff_id,
    s."firstname" AS first_name,
    s."lastname" AS last_name,
    'Chef' AS staff_role
FROM
    "staff" s
WHERE
    s."position" LIKE '%chef%'
UNION ALL
SELECT
    s."id" AS staff_id,
    s."firstname" AS first_name,
    s."lastname" AS last_name,
    'Server (English speaking)' AS staff_role
FROM
    "staff" s
WHERE
    s."position" LIKE '%server%'
    AND (
        s."languages" LIKE '%english%'
        OR s."languages" LIKE '%английский%'
        OR s."languages" LIKE '%English%'
        OR s."languages" LIKE '%Английский%'
    );
7:
SELECT DISTINCT
    s."id",
    s."firstname",
    s."lastname",
    s."position",
    s."languages"
FROM
    "staff" s
WHERE
    (
        LOWER(s."position") LIKE '%chef%'
        OR LOWER(s."position") LIKE '%server%'
    )
    AND (
        LOWER(s."languages") LIKE '%english%'
        OR LOWER(s."languages") LIKE '%английск%'
    )
ORDER BY
    s."lastname",
    s."firstname";
8:
SELECT
    s1."id" AS chef_id,
    s1."name" AS chef_name,
    s1."language" AS chef_language,
    s2."id" AS server_id,
    s2."name" AS server_name
FROM
    "staff" s1
JOIN
    "staff" s2 ON s1."language" = s2."language"
WHERE
    s1."position" LIKE '%chef%'
    AND s1."language" LIKE '%English%'
    AND s2."position" LIKE '%server%';
108:
WITH total_hospitals AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "hospitalid") AS total_count
    FROM "hospitals"
),
roles_in_all_hospitals AS (
    SELECT "roleid"
    FROM "hospitals_medical_roles" hmr
    GROUP BY "roleid"
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT "hospitalid") = (SELECT total_count FROM total_hospitals)
)
SELECT DISTINCT mr."salary"
FROM "medicalroles" mr
JOIN roles_in_all_hospitals raah ON mr."roleid" = raah."roleid";
109:
SELECT
    iss."name" AS support_specialist_name,
    s."name" AS system_name
FROM
    it_support_specialists iss
JOIN
    it_support_specialists_systems iss_s ON iss."id" = iss_s.it_specialist_id
JOIN
    systems s ON iss_s.system_id = s.system_id
ORDER BY
    iss."name",
    s."name";
110:
SELECT
    s."name" AS system_name,
    s."is_active" AS active_status,
    its."name" AS it_specialist_name
FROM
    "it_support_specialists" its
JOIN
    "it_support_specialists_systems" itss ON its."id" = itss."it_specialist_id"
JOIN
    "systems" s ON itss."system_id" = s."system_id"
ORDER BY
    its."name", s."name";
111:
SELECT
    its."id" AS specialist_id,
    its."name" AS specialist_name,
    s."system_id",
    s."system_name",
    s."active" AS system_active_status
FROM
    "it_support_specialists" its
JOIN
    "it_support_specialists_systems" iss ON its."id" = iss."it_specialist_id"
JOIN
    "systems" s ON iss."system_id" = s."system_id"
ORDER BY
    its."id", s."system_name";
112:
WITH total_internships AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "internshipid") AS total_count
    FROM "internships_responsibilities"
),
responsibility_counts AS (
    SELECT
        r."id" AS responsibility_id,
        r."name" AS responsibility_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ir."internshipid") AS internship_count
    FROM "responsibilities" r
    JOIN "internships_responsibilities" ir ON r."id" = ir."responsibilityid"
    GROUP BY r."id", r."name"
)
SELECT rc."responsibility_name"
FROM responsibility_counts rc
CROSS JOIN total_internships ti
WHERE rc."internship_count" = ti."total_count";
113:
SELECT
    i."id" AS "internship_id",
    i."title" AS "internship_title",
    r."name" AS "responsibility"
FROM
    "internships" i
JOIN
    "internships_responsibilities" ir ON i."id" = ir."internshipid"
JOIN
    "responsibilities" r ON ir."responsibilityid" = r."id"
ORDER BY
    i."id", r."name";
114:
SELECT
    its."id" AS specialist_id,
    its."name" AS specialist_name,
    s."system_id",
    s."system_name"
FROM
    "it_support_specialists" its
JOIN
    "it_support_specialists_systems" iss ON its."id" = iss."it_specialist_id"
JOIN
    "systems" s ON iss."system_id" = s."system_id"
ORDER BY
    its."id",
    s."system_id";
115:
SELECT
    i."title" AS internship_title,
    STRING_AGG(r."description", ', ' ORDER BY r."description") AS responsibilities_list
FROM
    "internships" i
JOIN
    "internships_responsibilities" ir ON i."id" = ir."internshipid"
JOIN
    "responsibilities" r ON ir."responsibilityid" = r."id"
GROUP BY
    i."title"
ORDER BY
    i."title";
261:
WITH max_salary_job AS (
    SELECT
        "jobid",
        "min_experience"::integer AS min_exp,
        "preferred_experience"::integer AS pref_exp
    FROM
        "jobs"
    WHERE
        "salary" ~ '^[0-9]+$' 
        AND "is_open" = 'true'
    ORDER BY
        "salary"::bigint DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    "min_exp" AS minimum_years_of_experience,
    "pref_exp" AS preferred_years_of_experience
FROM
    max_salary_job;
262:
SELECT
    s."minSalary" AS min_salary,
    s."maxSalary" AS max_salary,
    s."currency" AS currency,
    s."bonus" AS bonus,
    s."benefits" AS benefits
FROM
    "salarydetails" s
JOIN
    "position" p ON s."positionid" = p."id"
WHERE
    LOWER(p."title") LIKE '%software%'
    AND LOWER(p."title") LIKE '%developer%';
263:
SELECT
    AVG(
        CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(sd."salary", '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL) /
        (40 * 52)
    ) AS average_hourly_rate
FROM
    "salarydetails" sd
JOIN
    "position" p ON sd."positionid" = p."id"
WHERE
    LOWER(TRIM(p."title")) LIKE '%software developer%';
264:
SELECT
    p."title" AS job_position,
    sd."minSalary" AS salary_min,
    sd."maxSalary" AS salary_max
FROM
    "position" p
LEFT JOIN
    "salarydetails" sd ON p."id" = sd."positionid"
ORDER BY
    p."title";
265:
SELECT
    j."preferredyears"
FROM
    "jobs" j
WHERE
    j."salary" = (
        SELECT MAX(CAST(REPLACE(j2."salary", '$', '') AS NUMERIC))
        FROM "jobs" j2
        WHERE j2."jobstatus" LIKE '%open%'
    )
    AND j."jobstatus" LIKE '%open%'
    AND CAST(REPLACE(j."salary", '$', '') AS NUMERIC) = (
        SELECT MAX(CAST(REPLACE(j3."salary", '$', '') AS NUMERIC))
        FROM "jobs" j3
        WHERE j3."jobstatus" LIKE '%open%'
    );
266:
SELECT
    j."experience"
FROM
    "jobs" j
WHERE
    
    CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(j."salary", '$', ''), ',', '') AS NUMERIC) =
    (
        SELECT
            MAX(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE("salary", '$', ''), ',', '') AS NUMERIC))
        FROM
            "jobs"
        WHERE
            "isopen" = 'True'  
    )
    AND j."isopen" = 'True'  
LIMIT 1;
267:
SELECT
    f."address" AS street_address,
    f."city"
FROM
    "facilities" f
WHERE
    LOWER(f."type") LIKE '%rental%'
    OR LOWER(f."type") LIKE '%аренд%'
    OR LOWER(f."type") LIKE '%сдач%';
279:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM("location") AS rental_property_location
FROM
    "properties"
WHERE
    LOWER("property_type") LIKE '%rental%'
    OR LOWER("property_type") LIKE '%аренд%'
    OR LOWER("property_type") LIKE '%сдач%'
ORDER BY
    rental_property_location;
